calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-09-2022 Off Calendar

Notice Of Hearing For Default Prove Up
Off Calendar Apr-21-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Prove-Up Hearing as to defaulted defendant Lyndon K. Louie.
Dept. 514. Judge: Murlene J. Randle. Clerk: K. Dougherty. Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 10:24 a.m.

Kurtis Jacobs, Esq. appeared for plaintiff JPMorgan Chase Bank, N.A.
Mariana Echeverria-Licona, Associate Vendor Management Analyst and Custodian of Records for plaintiff, was placed under oath and testified.
Both Mr. Jacobs and Ms. Echeverria-Licona appeared via ZOOM for this morning's hearing.
No appearance by defendant Lyndon K. Louie.

Plaintiff's Complaint for Common Counts (Open Book and Account Stated) was filed on October 6, 2021, and was personally served on defendant Lyndon K. Louie on November 15, 2021.
Default as to defendant Lyndon K. Louie was entered on December 30, 2021.
No DOE defendants were named in plaintiff's complaint.

Plaintiff JPMorgan Chase Bank, N.A. submits the following exhibit for the Court's review:
Exhibit A: Billing Statement dated 04/21/2021 with balance of $25,150.07..............ID/EVID

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff JPMorgan Chase Bank, N.A., and against the defaulted defendant Lyndon K. Louie, as follows:

Damages/Principal - $25,150.77.
Prejudgment Interest - Waived.
Attorney Fees - Waived.
Costs - Waived.

Total - $25,150.77.

Proposed Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

Plaintiff STIPULATES to the return of the exhibit.

Proceedings concluded at 10:32 a.m.
